title: Duraflex, leader in waterproofing, opens shop in Mossel Bay
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Duraflex is an established,...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Duraflex is an established, proudly South African waterproofing manufacturer with its origins in the Eastern Cape.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Duraflex is an established, proudly South African waterproofing manufacturer with its origins in the Eastern Cape."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A leader in the advanced waterproofing sector, we help to improve both industrial and domestic spaces, offering weather-resistant waterproofing that protects against corrosion, to ensure your surfaces last far longer.","html":"A leader in the advanced waterproofing sector, we help to improve both industrial and domestic spaces, offering weather-resistant waterproofing that protects against corrosion, to ensure your surfaces last far longer."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Duraflex Liquid Rubber is a water-based environmentally safe alternative to conventional hot-applied or solvent-based waterproofing systems. It is unaffected by a range of acids, alkalis and waterborne salts and protects against ultraviolet rays, salt, thermal cycling and is resistant to biological deterioration.","html":"Duraflex Liquid Rubber is a water-based environmentally safe alternative to conventional hot-applied or solvent-based waterproofing systems. It is unaffected by a range of acids, alkalis and waterborne salts and protects against ultraviolet rays, salt, thermal cycling and is resistant to biological deterioration."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With the ability to cover several surfaces, both indoors and outdoors, our product is a highly versatile, with its water-based, elastomeric, UV-resistant, waterproof rubber coating.","html":"With the ability to cover several surfaces, both indoors and outdoors, our product is a highly versatile, with its water-based, elastomeric, UV-resistant, waterproof rubber coating."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This means you will be able to coat a wide range of areas and surfaces. It also guarantees that leaks are eradicated. Whether you have a pothole in your driveway, a leaking gutter, cracked concrete or anything in between, our range of products for waterproofing, asphalt and concrete repair have you covered.","html":"This means you will be able to coat a wide range of areas and surfaces. It also guarantees that leaks are eradicated. Whether you have a pothole in your driveway, a leaking gutter, cracked concrete or anything in between, our range of products for waterproofing, asphalt and concrete repair have you covered."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Our unique products serve a wide variety of applications and can provide multiple benefits in a single application. They have proven to be successful time and time again, due to their simple and safe application.","html":"Our unique products serve a wide variety of applications and can provide multiple benefits in a single application. They have proven to be successful time and time again, due to their simple and safe application."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Once applied, they act as an adhesive and bond extremely well to the substrate.","html":"Once applied, they act as an adhesive and bond extremely well to the substrate."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We invite you to the opening of the 5th Duraflex Store in the country this weekend. Visit Duraflex Waterproofing & Paint Centre Garden Route at 15 Bolton Street, Voorbaai in Mosselbay this Saturday, 31 May, for some great opening specials.","html":"We invite you to the opening of the 5th Duraflex Store in the country this weekend. Visit Duraflex Waterproofing & Paint Centre Garden Route at 15 Bolton Street, Voorbaai in Mosselbay this Saturday, 31 May, for some great opening specials."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more information, call 076 961 2113 or email [email protected]","html":"For more information, call 076 961 2113 or email [email protected]"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Duraflex, leader in waterproofing, opens shop in Mossel Bay
